issues.title: HTTP: use a persistent requests.Session for connection pooling

tests.scope: Two consecutive read calls against a known SANDBOX user verify that (a) the session is reused without breaking subsequent requests, (b) per-call custom headers still propagate over session-level defaults, and (c) public method signatures and domain methods continue to work end-to-end against a live Alma response.

needsHumanInput.description: A user_primary_id of an existing active user in the SANDBOX environment. Read-only; the test only performs GETs.

passCriteria: First call returns AlmaResponse with success == True.
Second call (with per-call custom_headers) returns AlmaResponse with success == True.
Both responses contain a non-empty .data payload (dict or parsed body) consistent with an Alma user record.
No AlmaAPIError, AlmaValidationError, or AlmaRateLimitError is raised across the two calls.

unmappable.ac: AC-1: A single `requests.Session` is created in `__init__` and reused across all four verbs.
unmappable.reason: Object identity of self._session and reuse across verbs is an internal implementation detail not observable through SANDBOX behavior. Verified by unit tests with mocked HTTP, not by live API calls.
This is a local test-suite assertion run pre-merge in CI/local environment, not an Alma SANDBOX behavior. Out of SANDBOX scope.

issues.title: HTTP: consolidate get/post/put/delete into a single _request() method

tests.scope: A single read call against a known SANDBOX user exercises the consolidated _request() path end-to-end: public GET signature is preserved, _safe_response_body() correctly parses the live JSON response, and the AlmaResponse wrapper is returned with the expected shape.

needsHumanInput.description: A user_primary_id of an existing active user in the SANDBOX environment. Read-only; the test only performs GETs. Same fixture as t-3-1; collect once and reuse.

passCriteria: Call returns AlmaResponse with success == True.
AlmaResponse.data is a non-empty dict (response body parsed by _safe_response_body without raising).
No AlmaAPIError, AlmaValidationError, or AlmaRateLimitError is raised.

unmappable.ac: AC-2: `_request` is the only place that calls `self._session.request`.
unmappable.reason: Sole-caller invariant is an internal code-organization property. SANDBOX cannot observe which Python method invoked the underlying session.request call. Verified by unit tests / static inspection, not by live API calls.
This is a local test-suite assertion run pre-merge in CI/local environment, not an Alma SANDBOX behavior. Out of SANDBOX scope.
